query:
INSERT INTO relaciones_sample (
                    cancion_destino_id,
                    cancion_fuente_id,
                    whosampled_id,
                    tipo_relacion,
                    tipo_elemento,
                    timings_destino,
                    timings_fuente,
                    aparece_en_todo,
                    sample_id,
                    sample_fuente_id,
                    sample_destino_id,
                    votos_total,
                    votos_promedio,
                    fuente,
                    contribuidor_id,
                    verificada
               )
               VALUES (
                    $1, $2, $3, $4, $5, COALESCE($6::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb), COALESCE($7::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb),
                    COALESCE($8, FALSE), $9, $10, $11, COALESCE($12, 0), COALESCE(ROUND(CAST($13 AS double precision)::numeric, 2), 0),
                    COALESCE($14, 'comunidad'), $15, COALESCE($16, FALSE)
               )
               RETURNING id AS "id!"
